2026-06-29::dinner.name: Ground Beef Pasta with Spaghetti Sauce
2026-06-29::dinner.ingredients: 2 lbs cooked ground beef, jar spaghetti sauce, can diced tomatoes, rotini pasta, shredded cheese, green bell pepper
2026-06-29::dinner.note: Use cooked ground beef; quick weeknight pasta

2026-06-30::dinner.name: Brined Roast Chicken with Roasted Sweet Potatoes and Green Beans
2026-06-30::dinner.ingredients: 2 lbs raw chicken, kosher salt, sugar, garlic, sweet potatoes, fresh green beans, olive oil, seasoning
2026-06-30::dinner.note: Anchor brined chicken; Bible Study day, prep ahead

2026-07-01::dinner.name: Cajun Sausages with Rice and Sautéed Mixed Vegetables
2026-07-01::dinner.ingredients: 4 Cajun sausages, parboiled rice, frozen mixed vegetables, butter, garlic, seasoning
2026-07-01::dinner.note: Date night — simple meal kids can reheat

2026-07-02::dinner.name: Shredded Chicken Tacos with Refried Beans
2026-07-02::dinner.ingredients: rotisserie chicken, tortillas, shredded cheese, refried beans, salsa verde, green bell pepper, carrots

2026-07-03::dinner.name: Spinach Pie with Caesar Salad
2026-07-03::dinner.ingredients: two pie crusts, frozen spinach, eggs, feta cheese, white onion, romaine lettuce, Caesar dressing, Parmesan
2026-07-03::dinner.note: Meatless Friday; fish fry needs flounder — shop first

2026-07-04::dinner.name: Pulled Pork with French Fries and Corn
2026-07-04::dinner.ingredients: 1 lb frozen pulled pork, hamburger buns, frozen french fries, frozen corn, butter, seasoning
2026-07-04::dinner.note: 4th of July; festive and easy cookout feel

2026-07-05::dinner.name: Ziplock Buffet — Leftovers Night with Lentil Soup
2026-07-05::dinner.ingredients: red lentils, canned diced tomatoes, carrots, onion, cumin, leftover rice, leftover chicken, leftover vegetables
2026-07-05::dinner.note: Sunday leftovers; batch lentil soup for week

2026-07-06::dinner.name: Black-Eyed Pea Jambalaya with Cajun Sausage
2026-07-06::dinner.ingredients: dried mixed beans (black-eyed peas), parboiled rice, green bell pepper, white onion, petite diced tomatoes, gumbo seasoning
2026-07-06::dinner.note: Legume anchor meal; use dried beans from pantry
